title: desmodium hartwegianum var. hartwegianum
intro: Desmodium hartwegianum var. hartwegianum, also known as Mexican tickclover or Hartweg's tickclover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Desmodium hartwegianum var. hartwegianum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and poultices made from the leaves and stems of the plant, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
